# RealInflation

> Real consumer price tracker across 115 US cities. Gas, rent, groceries, electricity, and car insurance — real prices vs. government CPI.

## What this site does

RealInflation tracks what Americans actually pay for everyday expenses, city by city, vs. what the government CPI reports. Data is sourced from BLS/FRED, AAA, Zillow ZORI, EIA, and Bankrate — plus community-submitted receipts.

## Data sources

- **Gas prices**: AAA state averages (scraped monthly)
- **Rent**: Zillow ZORI Metro Index (updated monthly, Feb 2026 latest)
- **Groceries**: BLS APU series via FRED API — eggs, milk, bread, ground beef, chicken
- **Electricity**: EIA Residential Electric Power state averages (2025)
- **Car insurance**: Bankrate/NAIC state averages (2025)
- **Fast food**: Community-submitted prices via /submit

## Coverage

115 US cities across all 50 states + DC. Includes all state capitals plus major metros.

## Key pages

- `/` — Homepage with interactive USA inflation map
- `/city/[slug]/` — City detail page (gas, rent, groceries, electricity, insurance, charts)
- `/states/` — Browse all 50 states
- `/state/[slug]/` — State hub with all cities
- `/compare/` — Side-by-side city comparison
- `/submit/` — Community price submission
- `/leaderboard/` — Top contributors
- `/methodology/` — Data methodology and sources

## City data format

Each city JSON is available at `/data/[city-slug].json` and includes:
- Gas: current price, history (60 months), vs-national comparison
- Rent: avg 1br/2br/all, YoY change, Zillow ZORI sourced
- Groceries: eggs, milk, bread, ground beef, chicken — all BLS national series
- Electricity: cents/kWh, monthly bill estimate, vs national avg
- Car insurance: annual/monthly premium, vs national avg
- Cost of living index (national avg = 100)

## Contact

Site: https://realinflation.co
Twitter/X: @realinflationco
Submit data: https://realinflation.co/submit/
